description_md: Sequential primary key (one row per ZooScan station tow).
CalCOFI cruise natural key (YYYY-MM-NODC), parsed as year-month (from the cruise code) + the NODC code of the resolved ship; NULL where unmatched to the cruise registry.
NODC ship key parsed from the 2-letter suffix of the cruise code (e.g. NH=New Horizon, SR=Sally Ride).
Vessel name from the ship registry.
CalCOFI station key 'LLL.L SSS.S' from line + station.
Station date + local PST time of the tow.
CalCOFI grid-cell key assigned spatially.
Point geometry (EPSG:4326) from longitude/latitude.
Sequential primary key for the bioclass lookup.
Verbatim ZooScan bioclass name (e.g. 'copepoda_eucalanids').
WoRMS AphiaID for the resolved taxon concept; NULL for non-taxonomic classes.
WoRMS accepted scientific name.
WoRMS taxonomic rank.
WoRMS status (accepted / unaccepted / non-taxonomic / not found).
Notes on combined or non-taxonomic operational ZooScan classes.
WoRMS kingdom.
WoRMS phylum.
WoRMS class.
WoRMS order (column named order_taxon; 'order' is a SQL reserved word).
WoRMS family.
Sequential primary key (one row per sample x taxon x measurement_type).
FK to zooscan_sample.sample_id.
FK to zooscan_taxon.taxon_id.
FK to measurement_type.measurement_type.
Abundance (No./m2), C biomass (mgC/m2), Feret diameter (mm), or individual C content (ugC). 0 = imaged-but-absent.
